ClaimLedgerRulesSeed.description: A /data/rewards claim-ledger rules seed file: versioned envelope (DC5) plus DC4 value metadata for every numeric leaf under `rules`.

max_unclaimed_packages_per_resource.description: Max unclaimed non-story packages holding a given CoreResource (Doc 04 §5: "5 unclaimed packages per resource type").

max_global_active_packages.description: Max global active non-story packages (Doc 04 §5: "20 global active non-story packages").

ClaimLedgerRules.description: The Doc 04 §5 slot-accounting caps (v1 values; sim-tuned only via this seed).

SeedValueMetadata.description: DC4 unit-requirement metadata for one numeric seed value. `path` is the dot-path of the numeric field under the seed's payload root (`kit` for guardian seeds, `storage` for resource-storage seeds); the validator enforces that every numeric leaf has exactly one entry and every entry resolves to a numeric leaf.

Unit.description: Value-cadence vocabulary for seed metadata (Doc 07 §2 / §1.2, DC4).
